strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and cloud environments.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of GISCollective, building an open-source geo-data platform.
Hands-on experience with modern cloud infrastructure (Kubernetes, AWS) and recent AI-agent developer tooling.
concerns: Lacks the required recognized expertise and strategic leadership in Artificial Intelligence at a Director-level.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
Limited evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on AI and cloud technology adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable software craftsman with over 15 years of hands-on engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial drive. However, the Principal Engineer role requires a Director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy and experience advising strategic enterprise customers. His recent, limited exposure to AI tooling does not meet the high-level AI leadership and strategic advisory requirements of this position.
